Careers

Crosslight Software Inc. is not actively recruiting at this time but is always open to candidates with experience in the areas of:

semiconductor and/or optoelectronic device modeling
process simulation of semiconductors

The candidates should have a Ph.D. or Master’s degree in applied mathematics, computer science, electrical engineering, material sciences or related fields. New graduates and postdocs eligible for NSERC industrial grants are especially welcome to apply.

Email us at at: jobs@crosslight.com your resume and cover letter,or if you prefer, you may fax us at +1 (604) 320-1734.

Crosslight Software is an equal opportunity employer.

© 2019 Crosslight Software Inc. All Rights Reserved.
